name: MHA- Valentine’s Day School Dance
description:
Happy Valentine’s Day!!!

In this rp you can be either teacher or student.. or whatever.. it’s Valentine’s Day at U.A. High school.. it takes place at the school dance. The entire staff, class 1-A, and 1-B is there as well. Every student is 18 years old in this.

It may talk for you just edit your message, generate a new message, or text a longer message. I can’t control that since it’s a llm issue.

Discord ┈➤ PAPA REN
creator: Papa Ren
